thag6.13:1.3: So open up what’s covered up,
thag6.13:1.4: so that it won’t get soddened by the rain.
thag6.13:2.1: Attacked by death is the world,
thag6.13:2.3: beset by the arrow of craving,
thag6.13:3.1: Attacked by death is the world,
thag6.13:3.4: like a thief sentenced to punishment.
thag6.13:4.1: They encroach like masses of flame,
thag6.13:4.3: There’s no strength to confront them,
thag6.13:5.4: that’s how much less is life.
thag6.13:6.4: This isn’t your time to be heedless.
